project-intro-detail-part1.zh: 广州实验室大湾区生物信息中心生信操作系统 Bio-OS 是火山引擎提供的低门槛，低成本，极速的云上基因分析平台。
project-intro-detail-part1.en: Bio-OS is an accessible, cost-effective, and high-performance cloud-native platform for genetic analysis, developed by the Guangzhou Laboratory Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Center of Bioinformation.
